queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the association between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings at least 1000 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evidence regarding the mitigating effect of savings balances at least 1000 DM on credit default likelihood.
